name: Compliance Suite
use_case: Compliance officers, quality teams, and credentialing specialists ensuring Medicare policy adherence and provider data accuracy.

mcps.why: Medicare policy monitoring, coverage determination lookup, and provider credential verification.
Enterprise HIPAA compliance layer with OAuth2, audit trails, and guardrails. Requires Innovaccer licensing.

example_prompts: Show me all Medicare coverage policy changes from the last 30 days
Look up NPI 1234567893 and verify their credentials and practice location
Which Medicare Administrative Contractor covers my jurisdiction?
Search for any new or proposed LCDs related to genetic testing
Validate that this NPI is active and properly formatted
